name: swarmcom
description: Lightweight communication and status coordination layer for agent systems.

scripts.matrix:generate:
mkdir -p ./.swarmcom/matrix/data && docker run --rm -e SYNAPSE_SERVER_NAME=localhost -e SYNAPSE_REPORT_STATS=no -v "/Users/jasonsebring/Development/Projects/swarmcom/.swarmcom/matrix/data:/data" matrixdotorg/synapse:latest generate && echo "
enable_registration: true
enable_registration_without_verification: true
" >> ./.swarmcom/matrix/data/homeserver.yaml
